conditionDescriptions: Severe chronic kidney disease with eGFR <30 mL/min/1.73m²
contraindications.clinicalRationale: Reduced renal clearance in severe CKD increases risk of hyperkalemia and drug accumulation
contraindications.riskDescription: Increased risk of hyperkalemia and reduced drug clearance
contraindications.alternativeConsiderations: Consider dose reduction by 50% when CrCl 10-30 mL/min
contraindications.sourceSnippet: CrCl 10–30 ml/min: Reduce initial recommended dose by 50% for adults. Max: 40 mg/day CrCl <10 ml/min: Reduce initial dosage to 2.5 mg PO once daily. Max: 40 mg/day

conditionDescriptions: End-stage renal disease with eGFR <10 mL/min/1.73m²
contraindications.clinicalRationale: Severely impaired renal clearance significantly increases risk of life-threatening hyperkalemia
contraindications.riskDescription: Life-threatening hyperkalemia due to severely reduced drug clearance
contraindications.alternativeConsiderations: Reduce initial dosage to 2.5 mg PO once daily with maximum 40 mg/day
contraindications.sourceSnippet: CrCl <10 ml/min: Reduce initial dosage to 2.5 mg PO once daily. Max: 40 mg/day

conditionDescriptions: Chronic kidney disease stage 4-5 with eGFR <30 mL/min/1.73m²
contraindications.clinicalRationale: Potassium-sparing diuretics have increased risk of hyperkalemia in reduced kidney function
contraindications.riskDescription: Hyperkalemia risk due to impaired renal potassium excretion
contraindications.alternativeConsiderations: Use with CrCl >30 ml/min as recommended

conditionDescriptions: Chronic kidney disease stage 4-5 with eGFR <45 mL/min/1.73m²
contraindications.clinicalRationale: Non-steroidal MRA requires adequate kidney function to minimize hyperkalemia risk
contraindications.riskDescription: Increased hyperkalemia risk with reduced kidney function
contraindications.alternativeConsiderations: Use with eGFR >45 ml/min per 1.73 m²
contraindications.sourceSnippet: Use with eGFR >45 ml/min per 1.73 m 2

warnings.warningText: Additional monitoring required for hyperkalemia as study outcome
warnings.actionRequired: Monitor serum potassium levels regularly when using MRA therapy

warnings.warningText: Limited data available for severe CKD populations
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with severe chronic kidney disease
warnings.actionRequired: Exercise caution and close monitoring in patients with severe kidney impairment
